# Operating Agreement — Multi-Member LLC

**IMPORTANT:** This is an educational template only. Have an attorney draft or review your operating agreement before use.

---

**OPERATING AGREEMENT OF [LLC NAME], LLC**

A [State] Limited Liability Company

**Date:** [Date]

---

## Article I — Organization

1.1 **Name.** The name of the LLC is [LLC Name], LLC.

1.2 **State.** The LLC is organized under the laws of the State of [State].

1.3 **Purpose.** The LLC is organized for the purpose of acquiring, owning, managing, and disposing of real property and related activities.

1.4 **Principal Office.** [Address]

1.5 **Registered Agent.** [Registered Agent Name and Address]

---

## Article II — Members

| Member Name | Membership Interest | Initial Capital Contribution |
|---|---|---|
| [Member 1] | [X]% | $[Amount] |
| [Member 2] | [Y]% | $[Amount] |

---

## Article III — Management

3.1 **Manager-Managed.** The LLC shall be managed by a Manager.

3.2 **Manager.** The initial Manager is [Manager Name].

3.3 **Manager Authority.** The Manager has authority to:
- Open and manage bank accounts
- Enter into contracts on behalf of the LLC
- Execute leases and rental agreements
- Make ordinary business decisions

3.4 **Member Vote Required For:**
- Sale or refinance of any property
- Addition or removal of Members
- Amendment of this Agreement
- Dissolution of the LLC

---

## Article IV — Capital Contributions and Distributions

4.1 **Contributions.** Members shall make initial contributions as listed in Article II.

4.2 **Distributions.** Distributions shall be made at the Manager's discretion, pro rata to Membership Interest.

4.3 **No Right to Demand Return.** No Member has the right to demand the return of their capital contribution.

---

## Article V — Allocations

5.1 Profits and losses shall be allocated to Members in proportion to their Membership Interest.

---

## Article VI — Transfer of Membership

6.1 No Member may transfer their interest without written consent of all other Members.

6.2 **Right of First Refusal.** Before transferring to a third party, a Member must first offer their interest to existing Members at the same price and terms.

---

## Article VII — Dissolution

The LLC shall dissolve upon:
- Written consent of all Members
- Judicial dissolution
- Any event requiring dissolution under state law

---

## Article VIII — Miscellaneous

8.1 **Governing Law.** This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of [State].

8.2 **Entire Agreement.** This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement among the Members.

---

**SIGNATURES**

_____________________________ Date: __________
[Member 1 Printed Name]

_____________________________ Date: __________
[Member 2 Printed Name]

---

## Notes for Real Estate LLCs

- Each property should be in a **separate LLC** for liability isolation (or use Series-LLC if available in your state: Delaware, Texas, Illinois, Ohio).
- Operating agreement should specify whether the LLC can take on debt (mortgage) and who can sign loan documents.
- Lenders may require a resolution authorizing the Manager to sign closing documents.
- Consult a real estate attorney and CPA before finalizing.
